headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://maps.googleapis.com https://maps.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'
